name: micro-verbose-tooldesc
description: Lever 3 (tool descriptions + parameter surface): swap the custom read/grep tools for the `verbose` variant under scripts/harness_micro_tools/verbose/ — identical behaviour, but the tool descriptions spell out the parameters and give a worked example (e.g. read offset/limit, grep pattern). Tests whether a more explicit description/param surface improves the small model's call fidelity (fewer missing offset/limit, fewer malformed patterns) vs the terse baseline descriptions.
